<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tag; interface Formatter { /** * Formats a tag into a string representation according to a specific format, such as Markdown. */ public function format(Tag $tag): string; }
